case_title: MARIA ANN JOHNSON HUNTER VS. REYMOND ZHANG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE RE: AMENDED DEFT'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT. FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT ZHANG, REYMOND AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON
AMENDED CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZHANG, REYMOND AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, REYMOND IT IS UNCLEAR HOW MUCH OF THE DAMAGE ASSERTED BY DEFENDANT WAS PRE-EXISTING TO PLAINTIFF'S TENANCY, BUT THE COURT FINDS THAT AT LEAST THE VALUE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS THE SUSTAINED DAMAGE TO THE PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED JUL-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, REYMOND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARIA ANN JOHNSON HUNTER & DEFENDANT REYMOND ZHANG. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT REYMOND ZHANG & CROSS-DEFENDANT MARIA ANN JOHNSON HUNTER. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED.
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM TO CORRECT PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, REYMOND

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON ZHANG, REYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,015.89 FILED BY HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, REYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZHANG, REYMOND AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ZHANG, REYMOND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HUNTER, MARIA ANN JOHNSON BASED ON DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS NOT LIABLE FOR THE ADDITIONAL DAMAGES ASSERTED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
